title: Anthropic Just Warned Everyone About Claude (It’s Evolving)
summary: Anthropic has published warnings about AI self-improvement, with Claude now handling code writing, review, experiments, and AI system development. OpenAI has issued similar warnings about this trend, suggesting the pace of AI advancement may be accelerating faster than expected.
